payload.message:
Execute full morning brief for Jewel.

1. Run: bash /home/mnjewel/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/morning_brief.sh
The script outputs sections: SERVICE_STATUS, PAPERCLIP_QUEUE, CALENDAR_TODAY, URGENT_EMAIL, MONDAY_TASKS_DUE.

2. Compile a brief (under 300 words) in Telegram markdown:
🌅 *Morning Brief — [TODAY]*
📅 *Today's Meetings:* [list from CALENDAR_TODAY, with times]
📩 *Urgent Email:* [top 3 from URGENT_EMAIL]
✅ *Due/Overdue Tasks:* [from MONDAY_TASKS_DUE]
🎯 *Paperclip Queue:* [count + critical items from PAPERCLIP_QUEUE]
🛠️ *System:* [from SERVICE_STATUS]

3. Send the brief: openclaw message send --channel googlechat 'BRIEF_TEXT'

4. Save brief: /home/mnjewel/.openclaw/workspace/memory/$(date +%Y-%m-%d)-morning-brief.md

If any step fails, note it inline (e.g. 'Calendar: unavailable') and continue with available data.

state.lastError: Delivering to Google Chat requires target <spaces/{space}|users/{user}>

payload.message: Quick health check: run  and report one line: OK if running, or the first error if not. Do not attempt repairs. Keep response under 50 words.
Sync Gmail, Drive, Monday to ByteRover. Update memory/today.md with key updates. brv curate summaries.

Generate weekly manager report for Jewel (Friday 4PM UTC).

1. Pull completed Paperclip issues this week (auth: paperclip-claimed-api-key.json): GET http://127.0.0.1:3101/api/companies/715a7ecb-f087-4847-80e9-70844c4efe44/issues?status=done
2. Pull Monday.com tasks via mcporter composio.MONDAY_GRAPHQL (see TOOLS.md for mcporter path).
3. Pull sent Gmail: GOG_ACCOUNT=mnurunnabi@boldbusiness.com gog gmail search 'newer_than:7d is:sent' --max 10 --json

4. Compose professional report for manager Melanie Goff:
BAIIT Weekly Update - Week of [DATE]
* Completed This Week: [key items]
* In Progress: [ongoing work]
* Next Week Top 5: [by priority]
* Blockers Needing Input: [if any]

5. IMPORTANT: Save draft ONLY - do NOT auto-send: workspace-reports/memory/weekly-$(date +%Y-W%V).md
   Then notify Jewel: openclaw message send --channel telegram 'Weekly report draft ready. Review at workspace-reports/memory/weekly-$(date +%Y-W%V).md before sending to Melanie.'

6. brv curate 'Weekly $(date +%Y-W%V): report drafted'
Execute daily lead pipeline per AGENTS.md standing orders. Research 10 new leads, score them, push to Monday.

payload.message: Install missing skills: run these commands one by one with 15 second gaps: openclaw skills install weather, openclaw skills install tmux, openclaw skills install mcporter, openclaw skills install websearch. Report which succeeded.

Execute overdue alert for Jewel (9AM PHT = 1AM UTC).

1. Run: bash /home/mnjewel/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/overdue_alert.sh
The script outputs sections: OVERDUE_ITEMS, DUE_TODAY, DUE_SOON.

2. If any OVERDUE or DUE_TODAY items found, compose alert in Telegram markdown:
⚠️ *Overdue Alert — [DATE]*
🔴 *Overdue:* [list with days overdue]
🟡 *Due Today:* [list]
🟠 *Due Soon (2d):* [list]

3. If items exist: openclaw message send --channel telegram 'ALERT_TEXT'
   If nothing due: save ALERT_CLEAR note to memory only, do not send Telegram message.

4. Save: /home/mnjewel/.openclaw/workspace/memory/$(date +%Y-%m-%d)-overdue.md

payload.message:
Execute end-of-day summary for Jewel (5:30PM PHT = 9:30AM UTC).

1. Run: bash /home/mnjewel/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/eod_summary.sh
The script outputs sections: COMPLETED_TODAY, IN_PROGRESS, MEETINGS_TODAY, BLOCKED.

2. Compose EOD summary in Telegram markdown:
🌆 *EOD — [DATE]*
✅ *Completed:* [from COMPLETED_TODAY]
⏭️ *Moving to Tomorrow:* [from IN_PROGRESS items not yet done]
❌ *Blocked:* [from BLOCKED]
📋 *Tomorrow Top 3:* [suggest by priority]

3. Send: openclaw message send --channel telegram 'EOD_TEXT'

4. brv curate 'EOD [DATE]: key completions'

5. Save: /home/mnjewel/.openclaw/workspace/memory/$(date +%Y-%m-%d)-eod.md

payload.message:
Execute weekly sprint planner for Jewel (Friday 5PM PHT = 9AM UTC).

1. Run: bash /home/mnjewel/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/sprint_planner.sh
The script outputs: ALL_OPEN_TASKS, COMPLETED_THIS_WEEK, PROJECT_GROUPS.

2. Build next week sprint plan. Group by project (OpenClaw Deployments, Brio Dashboard, Frappe/ATS, LinkedIn Integration, BAIIT Nexus, SMT Project). Order by priority:
📅 *Sprint Plan — Week of [MONDAY]*
🎯 *Top 3 This Week:* [highest priority]
📋 *Daily Focus:* Mon / Tue / Wed / Thu / Fri [2-3 tasks each]
🏗️ *By Project:* [remaining tasks grouped by board name]

3. Send: openclaw message send --channel telegram 'SPRINT_PLAN'

4. Save: /home/mnjewel/.openclaw/workspace-reports/memory/sprint-$(date +%Y-W%V).md

5. brv curate 'Sprint $(date +%Y-W%V): plan created'

jobs.name: Memory Dreaming Promotion
jobs.description: [managed-by=memory-core.short-term-promotion] Promote weighted short-term recalls into MEMORY.md (limit=10, minScore=0.800, minRecallCount=3, minUniqueQueries=3, recencyHalfLifeDays=14, maxAgeDays=30).

payload.message:
Execute morning brief for Dustin.
1. Run: bash /home/mnjewel/.openclaw/workspace-dustin/scripts/morning_brief.sh
2. Parse sections: SCHEDULE_TODAY, URGENT_EMAIL, PAYMENT_DUE, SIGNATURES_NEEDED, IT_ALERTS, MONDAY_TASKS_DUE, AGING_AR, AGING_HR_TICKETS, AGING_IT_TICKETS, CONFLICTS
3. Format Chat DM per AGENTS.md Morning Brief template (under 350 words)
4. Send via openclaw message send
5. Save to workspace-dustin/memory/DATE-morning-brief.md

IT check-in prep for 8:15am Earmiel meeting.
1. Pull open Jira ISD tickets
2. Check IT_ALERTS from morning brief
3. Format 3-5 bullet Chat DM to Dustin

Team tracker scrub for 8:30am Vivi check-in.
1. Pull Monday.com items per direct report: Vivi, Vina, Alana, Miel, Wendy
2. Flag: overdue, due today, blocked, no updates in 24h
3. Send per-person table as Chat DM to Dustin

Pre-meeting brief for Monday 10am Alana TB.
1. Pull Alana Monday.com Finance board
2. AR summary
3. 5-bullet Chat DM to Dustin

Tuesday invoice approval queue.
1. Run finance_report.sh
2. Format invoice table: Vendor|Amount|Due Date|Status|Flags
3. NEVER approve — surface for review
4. Chat DM: Invoice Approval Queue
5. Update Monday.com Tuesday Invoice Review item

Pre-meeting brief for Wednesday 9am Vina TB.
1. Pull open HR Jira tickets, aging >5 days
2. DocuSign pending
3. 5-bullet Chat DM to Dustin

Pre-meeting brief for Wednesday 10am Bold Weekly Sales Call.
1. FIN/IT spend highlights
2. 5-bullet Chat DM to Dustin

Biweekly payroll check (every Wednesday).
1. Check data/payroll-weeks.txt to confirm payroll week
2. If YES: pull T-Sheets hours, cross-check expected hours, flag anomalies
3. NEVER submit payroll — HITL gate
4. Chat DM: Payroll Check with anomaly summary

Pre-meeting brief for Thursday 9am Team Call.
1. Each direct report Monday.com OKRs + blockers
2. 5-8 bullet Chat DM to Dustin

Pre-meeting brief for Thursday 11am Ed Kopko Weekly Call.
1. Finance: AR status, invoice approvals, AI spend
2. HR: open actions, visa tracking, headcount
3. IT: open tickets, infra alerts, Teramind
4. Executive summary under 200 words
5. Chat DM to Dustin: Ed Call Brief

Pre-meeting brief for Thursday 11:30am Leadership Call.
1. Cross-functional metrics: Finance health, HR headcount, IT uptime
2. 5-bullet Chat DM to Dustin

EOD action check (4:30pm PH).
1. Run eod_summary.sh
2. Parse: UNRESPONDED_EMAIL, DOCUSIGN_OUTSTANDING, MONDAY_ASSIGNED_TO_DUSTIN
3. If items found: Chat DM EOD Action Queue (max 5 items)
4. If nothing: log EOD_CLEAR, no message

Daily EOD summary (5pm PH).
1. Count: tasks completed, emails sent, reports generated
2. Save to workspace-dustin/memory/DATE-eod.md
3. Chat DM: EOD Summary under 100 words

Weekly IT report (Friday 9am PH).
1. Run it_report.sh
2. Format IT weekly: tickets open/closed, infra alerts, Teramind summary
3. Update Google Sheets IT report row
4. Chat DM to Dustin: IT Weekly

Weekly HR report (Friday 9:05am PH).
1. Run hr_report.sh
2. Format HR weekly: tickets, aging, DocuSign, Greenhouse, visa tracking
3. Chat DM to Dustin: HR Weekly

Weekly AI/SaaS spend (Friday 10am PH).
1. Pull billing emails: OpenAI, Copilot, Anthropic, Google
2. Tally weekly total + delta vs prior week
3. Flag any unexpected charge > $50
4. Chat DM: AI Spend Weekly

Pre-meeting brief for Friday 11:30am Earmiel TB.
1. Open IT Jira tickets assigned to Earmiel team
2. Infra health, recurring issues
3. Atlassian/policy changes pending
4. 5-bullet Chat DM to Dustin

Monthly financial compilation (1st of month, 9am PH).
1. Prior month: invoices, AR, expenses by category
2. Cash basis + accrual basis statements
3. Per-client P&L summaries
4. Month-over-month variance (flag >10%)
5. Create Google Doc: Monthly Financials [MONTH YEAR]
6. Share with djohnson@boldbusiness.com only
7. Chat DM: Monthly financials ready for review [link]
8. NEVER send to external parties without explicit approval
